reasoning: Superhero movies have a very low base rate of winning Best Costume Design (historically only the Black Panther movies have won for the MCU). While 'The Fantastic Four: First Steps' has a 1960s retro-futuristic aesthetic and received a Costume Designers Guild (CDG) nomination in the Sci-Fi/Fantasy category, it was shut out of the Critics Choice Awards nominations (only making the shortlist, while competitor 'Frankenstein' won). The primary frontrunners for the Oscar are 'Wicked: For Good' and 'Frankenstein'. Furthermore, the Polymarket prediction market priced this outcome at 0.00 on January 8, 2026. Without major precursor wins, its chances of pulling off an upset win at the Oscars are extremely remote.
